# Chapter 12: Engineering quantum mechanics  (~80 pp)
- 12.1 Why classical physics is not enough at the device scale (10) · 12.2 Photon, electron, semiconductor (12) · 12.3 LED, laser, photovoltaic (15) · 12.4 The transistor as a quantum device (15) · 12.5 MRI, electron microscopy, X-ray (12) · 12.6 Failure section: quantum-noise floors and the limits of classical design (16)

**Archetype**: scaling (down to atomic), interface. **Project**: characterise the I-V curve of a diode; identify quantum vs classical regions. **Exercises**: 25.
